description_long: This is a life-sized marble sculpture of a seated man, dressed in 19th-century attire, with a relaxed yet dignified posture. The figure sits on a roughly hewn stone-like base, with one leg crossed over the other and his right arm resting on the back of the seat. The left hand holds a palette, suggesting the subject may be an artist, while the right hand rests on his lap. The base of the sculpture is inscribed with the name 'J. E. Schindler,' indicating the identity of the figure. The entire sculpture is rendered in a light gray stone, with detailed folds in the clothing and realistic facial features. The base is rectangular and solid, providing stability and prominence to the figure.
description: A detailed marble sculpture of a seated man in 19th-century clothing, holding a palette, with the name 'J. E. Schindler' inscribed on the base. The figure is lifelike and rests on a solid, rectangular stone pedestal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, crossed legs, and the inscription 'J. E. Schindler' on the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the palette in the man's left hand and the detailed drapery of his clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and the rough, stone-like texture of the seat.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the relaxed posture and the man's right arm resting on the seat back.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure, J. E. Schindler
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be designed for outdoor or public urban settings, such as a plaza, park, or garden, based on its solid base and commemorative style.
